title: You Can't Run Away from It
writer: Samuel Hopkins Adams, Claude Binyon, Robert Riskin
actors: June Allyson, Jack Lemmon, Charles Bickford
plot: Ellen (June Allyson) is kidnapped by her father (Charles Bickford) after she ran off and got married to someone he thinks is a gold digger. She escapes and starts an adventurous trip back to Houston to be with her husband. Her fat...
